title: 3 Pack Serving Tray Plastic, Compartment Serving Platters, BPA free, Dinner/Fruit/Snack Food Tray for Kichen, Bar, Buffets, Party, Thanks Giving Day, Christmas
features: Food Grade: These serving platter are LFGB food certified to protect your safety and food safety, more peace of mind, and can hold any kind of food.

Compartmentalised Design: The set contains 3 trays, each measuring 38.1 x 25.4 x 3.3 cm, with 3 compartments, ideal for serving a variety of appetisers, desserts, biscuits, fruits, vegetables and more.

Sturdy and Durable:These serving tray are reusable, lightweight and easy to carry and handle. These plastic trays have 3.3cm high sides to prevent items from falling. They can also be used as kitchen storage trays. Durable, shatter and crack resistant.

Occasions: This trays for food serving is suitable for all kinds of parties and gatherings, such as birthday parties, graduation parties, weddings, Thanks Giving Day, Christmas and so on. The dinner plates are designed to meet your needs and can be effortlessly transformed into breakfast or dinner plates for both daily meals and special occasions

Easy to Clean:This divided serving tray is smooth and easy to clean. You can hand wash or wipe with a damp cloth. In addition, these kitchen trays are stackable, ensuring easy storage and keeping the storage space tidy when not in use.
description: WELDUN 3 Pack Divided Serving Tray Plastic, Dinner/Fruit/Snack Food Serving Platters for Kichen, Bar, Parties
